items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-22095 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-14T17:27:19Z
let lookback = 1d;

| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-22095", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc

items.title: CVE-2026-15548: A security vulnerability has been detected in Shibby Tomato up to 1.28.0000. This vulnerability affects the function sub
items.description: A security vulnerability has been detected in Shibby Tomato up to 1.28.0000. This vulnerability affects the function sub_407220 of the file /usr/sbin/httpd of the component DNS List Rendering. The manipulation leads to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. This project is superseded by FreshTomato.

items.title: VMware Avi Load Balancer Vulnerabilities Let Attackers Bypass Authentication
items.description:
Broadcom-owned VMware has disclosed multiple security flaws in its Avi Load Balancer platform (formerly NSX Advanced Load Balancer) that let attackers bypass authentication controls and gain unauthorized database access through crafted SQL queries. The most severe of these, CVE-2025-22217, carries a CVSSv3 score of 8.6 and requires no authentication or user interaction to exploit. The []

items.description:
URL path injection via unencoded user-supplied identifiers vulnerability in Apache Gravitino.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 1.2.1, which fixes the issue.

items.title: CVE-2026-15557: A weakness has been identified in waooAI waoowaoo up to 0.4.1. Affected by this vulnerability is the function getInterna
items.description: A weakness has been identified in waooAI waoowaoo up to 0.4.1. Affected by this vulnerability is the function getInternalTaskSession/getAuthSession/requireUserAuth/requireProjectAuth/requireProjectAuthLight in the library src/lib/api-auth.ts of the component Internal Task Header Handler. This manipulation of the argument x-internal-user-id request causes improper authentication. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

items.title: CVE-2026-49876: Authenticated SSRF in Gravitino JobManager allows server-side HTTP requests to internal network and cloud metadata endpo
items.description:
Authenticated SSRF in Gravitino JobManager allows server-side HTTP requests to internal network and cloud metadata endpoints via unvalidated job template URIs. A vulnerability in Apache Gravitino.

This issue affects Apache Gravitino: from 1.0.0 through 1.2.1.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 1.3.0, which fixes the issue.

items.title: CVE-2026-13014: A vulnerability inThales CERT "Suspicious" application =< 1.3.4 allows a remote and unauthenticated attacker to execute
items.description:
A vulnerability inThales CERT "Suspicious" application =< 1.3.4 allows a remote and unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code andarbitrarily overwrite writable application filesincluding Python modules, configuration files, cron inputs, and runtime artifactsleading to a persistent denial of service, the potential compromise of application secrets or integrations, and root-level execution inside the Django application container.
This vulnerability has been names "Matryoshka Mail".
Thales PSIRT 
acknowledges and thanks

Lucien Doustaly (aka wlayzz) for discovering and reporting this issue.

items.title: CVE-2026-22102: A POST request sent to a specific webserver endpoint can be used to write to arbitrary file locations. The endpoint acce
items.description:
A POST request sent to a specific webserver endpoint can be used to write to arbitrary file locations. The endpoint accepts the filename parameter in the Content-Disposition header without verification.
This can be used to cause a denial of service by overwriting system files, or remote-code-execution by overwriting shell-scripts which execution can be triggered through other means.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-22102 A POST request sent to a specific webserver endpoint can be used 
id: 5ce97b24-caeb-5ed9-a58a-370d8687b07e
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-22102 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-22102
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/14
modified: 2026/07/14
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-22102 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-14T17:27:19Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-22102", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-22102 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:7103905; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-14, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: High confidence based on: CVSS score 9.5 (Critical); EPSS score 0.431 (elevated exploitation probability)
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.title: CVE-2026-22096: The webserver running on port 8090 does not require authentication. This allows for sensitive information leakage such a
items.description: The webserver running on port 8090 does not require authentication. This allows for sensitive information leakage such as configured passwords, or uploading files through different endpoints.
